text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I'm running in the Oka Sho! I'm
going to roar through the Classic Tiara tour—but
without overdoing it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Except I overdo it and break a bunch of things!
Is my Princess☆Power running out of control?!
That may be the case, but I can still win!
